prompt: I need to add the ettech parser. The newsletter comes from newsletter@ettech.com and has India's top 5 tech stories per edition.
assertions: References docs/DESIGN.md ETtech parser section before writing code
References parsers/base_parser.py to understand the interface to implement
Mentions needing a real email fixture before starting implementation
Produces an ETtechParser class that inherits from BaseParser
Mentions registering the parser in agents/ingestion.py
Mentions ET paywall limitation and snippet fallback strategy
